creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
I'm sorry that this particular report did not receive a written response in good time. 

From the attachment: 

> 2nd Generation Core Processor Family Integrated Graphics Controller

Randomly picking the uppermost result from <https://bsd-hardware.info/?view=search&vendor=Intel&name=2nd+Generation+Core+Processor+Family+Integrated+Graphics+Controller&typeid=graphics+card&d=FreeBSD#list> suggests that this hardware should be fine with currently supported software. 

<https://www.freshports.org/graphics/drm-kmod/>
